title: All Creepypasta in One
description: All mystical versions, and ARG in one mod.
body:
# All Creepypasta in One
Do you **like horrors**, **ARG or Mystical versions**? **This mod is for you!**

![Preview 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a239c44aa1d8291d4523177d6345ff0f9350190f.png)

**LOUD SOUNDS WARNING!**

This **horror mod** is made from **various creepypastas**. There are **70+ events**, **30+ mobs** from different creepypastas.

---------------------------------------------------------
**You should know...**
- **Mod can grief your world!**
- **Don't go beyond _x_ blocks or you die.** (You can configure this in the config.(Not in version for 1.20.1)(This feature is experimental))
- If you **found a bug** or **you have a proposal**, please **report about it**.
----

**For best expirience**
- Programmer Art
- Programmer Art + (or other)
- MC VHS (or any similar)
- Render Distance: 2 chuncks
- NO CHEATS!
---
